other_findings.finding: ILC2 cells (annotated as ILC2_3) are present from early gestation in prenatal skin
ILC2_3 was annotated as 'Type 2 innate lymphoid cell' with immune effector function
Innate immune cells, such as macrophages and innate lymphoid cells (ILCs), were present from early gestation
other_findings.source: Main text, Section: Single-cell atlas of human prenatal skin

other_findings.finding: Some subsets of macrophages, ILCs and fibroblasts exhibited distinct gene expression profiles between early and late gestation
other_findings.source: Main text, Section: Single-cell atlas of human prenatal skin

evidence_quotes.quote: Innate immune cells, such as macrophages and innate lymphoid cells (ILCs), were present from early gestation
evidence_quotes.context: Description of immune cell temporal dynamics in prenatal skin

evidence_quotes.quote: ILC2_3 cluster marker genes: IL1RL1, GATA3, IL7R, TNFRSF18
